` }, 'grid': { html: ` Data Grid

📊 Data Grid

ID Name Email Status Action
001 John Doe john@example.com Active
002 Jane Smith jane@example.com Active
` } }; if (templates[templateId]) { const template = templates[templateId]; document.getElementById('codeInput').value = template.html; updateCode(); previewApp(); alert(`App template "${templateId}" applied!`); } document.getElementById('appTemplateSelect').value = ''; } async function newApp() { const name = prompt('App name:'); if (!name) return; try { const resp = await fetch('/api/user-apps', { method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify({name, icon: '📦'}) }); if (resp.ok) { const json = await resp.json(); const app = json.data.app || json.data; apps.push(app); renderAppList(); selectApp(app.id); } } catch (e) { let msg = 'Creation failed: ' + e.message; if (window.ErrorSuggestions) { const suggestions = window.ErrorSuggestions.generateSuggestions(e); if (suggestions.length > 0) { msg += '\n\n💡 Suggestions:\n'; suggestions.slice(0, 2).forEach((s, idx) => { msg += (idx + 1) + '. ' + s.title + '\n ' + s.hint + '\n'; }); } } alert(msg); } } function previewApp() { const code = document.getElementById('codeInput').value; document.getElementById('preview').srcdoc = code; } function runApp() { if (currentApp) window.open(`/apps/${currentApp.id}/dist/index.html`, '_blank'); } function exportApp() { if (!currentApp) return; const manifest = JSON.stringify(currentApp, null, 2); const code = document.getElementById('codeInput').value; const data = {manifest, code, name: currentApp.name}; const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], {type: 'application/json'}); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = `${currentApp.id}-export.json`; a.click(); } document.getElementById('codeInput').addEventListener('input', () => { unsavedChanges = true; clearTimeout(autoSaveTimer); autoSaveTimer = setTimeout(() => autoSave(), AUTO_SAVE_DELAY); }); initEditor(); document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.ctrlKey && e.key === 's') { e.preventDefault(); saveApp(); } });
